name: Residential Monitoring Model
consequences: Immediate: Enhanced safety modifications reduce injury risk → Systemic: 15% increase in participant retention due to perceived comfort → Strategic: Balances clinical control with naturalistic behavior capture, but risks over-reliance on physical constraints limiting generalizability. Controls safety protocols vs. behavioral authenticity. Weakness: The options fail to consider long-term participant fatigue from prolonged stays.

Introduce biometric feedback loops to dynamically adjust environmental safeguards

review: Controls safety protocols vs. behavioral authenticity. Weakness: The options fail to consider long-term participant fatigue from prolonged stays.
